description: Authoritative index of every contract distributed by this registry. fetch-contracts.yml, propose-contract.yml, dispatch-contract-change.yml and contract-conformance.yml all resolve paths, status and consumer bindings from this file. Edit this file (via PR) when a contract is added, promoted, or a consumer binding changes.
path_convention: Contracts are stored flat, one folder per source repository: Contracts/{repo-name}/. Each repo derives its own path from its own name; no group/domain lookup, no advance registration. The folder is created on first sync (mkdir -p). New entries use a repo-name key and path; the legacy entries below still use the old group/product paths and migrate to Contracts/{repo-name}/ when their source repo next syncs.

status_vocabulary.draft: Authored, not yet reviewed. Never fetched by consumers.
status_vocabulary.review: Under registry-owner review. Proposable via propose-contract.yml; not fetchable.
status_vocabulary.ratified: Reviewed and accepted. Fetchable by bound consumers. Changes require an amendment notice.
status_vocabulary.canonical: The single authoritative contract for its domain. Fetchable. Forking it in a consumer is a conformance failure.

open_items: Namespace deviation: synced files declare 'SparxStar\Helios' but the canonical convention is 'Starisian\Sparxstar\Helios'. Fix is upstream in the Helios source repo (Starisian-Technologies/helios-trust) — rename the namespace there and let the sync propagate. Do not edit synced files here; manual edits are overwritten on the next sync, and composer.json autoload + these manifest namespaces/symbols must follow the source rename.
Identify and bind DVE Sky-Esu consumer repositories so dispatch-contract-change.yml can notify downstreams.

Naming mismatch: the namespace product segment is 'Sky' (Starisian\Sparxstar\Sky\Contract) while the directory/slug is 'Sky-Esu', and the namespace adds a '\Contract' segment beyond the 'Starisian\Sparxstar\{Product}' convention. Reconciling Sky vs Sky-Esu is an ESU source-repo decision; flag upstream rather than editing synced files here.
